text: Amazing Course , teaches you right from basics . Prof . Ng explains everything in a manner which makes it easy to understand . Only one shortcoming I found in this course is , not challenging enough programming exercises . I understand that course has to cater a general and large crowd , but adding maybe a few optional challenging exercises might help . Also , if optional video content is provided for algorithms which have been taught in CS229 but are absent here , it will be really useful .
